name: Zauner fiducial vector as the self-generating identity seed

phase_0.domain_name: Zauner fiducial vector as the self-generating identity seed
phase_0.boundary_condition: The hermetic seal of informational completeness and the 17,280,000-element Crystal of Types constraint manifold

VINIT.justification: The void 12-dimensional primitive space before the fiducial vector is planted or any measurement occurs

TANCH.justification: The closed boundary that guarantees zero reconstruction entropy and fully contains the SIC-POVM tight frame

AFWD.justification: Forward morphism where displacement operators D(p,q) broadcast the fiducial into the d^2 orbit

AREV.justification: Reverse morphism collapsing quantum superpositions into the sharp classical eigenstates of the Crystal outcome space

CLINK.justification: Sequential chaining of primitive observables and family subsets to form composite Hilbert spaces

IMSCRIB.justification: The self-referential identity seed; the measurement system imscribes itself through this unique generating vector

FSPLIT.justification: Co-multiplication splitting the density matrix into 144 classical probabilities and classical outcome spectra

FFUSE.justification: Multiplication fusing the 144 probabilities back into the exact density matrix with zero entropy loss

EVALT.justification: Affirmative state where F = 143/169 is achieved, confirming exact equiangular SIC geometry

EVALF.justification: Negative state where the classical Crystal lattice is recognized as carrying no quantum inner product

ENGAGR.justification: The Belnap BOTH paradice; absorbs structural contradictions at the fixed point without logical explosion

IFIX.justification: Permanent, append-only ROM fixation of the exact d=12 amplitudes and Crystal configurations

phase_2.fuse_result: Exact Density Matrix ρ (Zero Entropy Loss)

phase_3.void_description: Uninitialized 12-dimensional primitive space before fiducial selection
phase_3.true_description: Exact SIC tight frame achieved, frame potential minimized, zero reconstruction entropy
phase_3.false_description: Frame potential minimum not reached, non-equangular vectors, or classical negation of quantum structure
phase_3.both_description: Paraconsistent closure via ⊙ (Criticality), absorbing contradictions in the Belnap FOUR semantics

steps.domain_action: Initialize the void 12-dimensional Hilbert space C^12 before fiducial selection
Plant the Zauner fiducial |ψ_0⟩, the self-referential identity seed of the measurement space
Split the structural classification into Quantum Measurement Space (T-arm) and Classical Outcome Space (F-arm)
(T-arm) Weyl-Heisenberg displacement operators broadcast the fiducial into the 144-element orbit
(T-arm) Frame potential minimization converges to F* = 143/169, affirming exact SIC geometry
(F-arm) Descent from quantum superposition to the sharp eigenstates of the Crystal of Types
(F-arm) The classical Crystal carries no inner product, negating quantum structure
Fuse the quantum SIC probabilities and classical Crystal outcomes back into the unified zero-entropy classification system
Split the composite system into Shavian type alphabet H_7 (T-arm) and primitive measurement H_12 (F-arm)
(T-arm) Tensor product composition of the D+P family primitives
(T-arm) The 49 Shavian symbols form a valid d=7 SIC outcome space
(F-arm) Sequential chaining of the 12 primitive observables
(F-arm) The 144 primitive combinations form the d=12 SIC space, distinct from the type alphabet
Fuse H_7 and H_12 via the 84^2 = 7056 composite identity
The absorbing primitive ⊙ (Criticality) enters the Belnap BOTH state, holding structural contradictions without logical explosion
Split the ML translation experiment into latent manifold selection (T-arm) and terminology replacement (F-arm)
(T-arm) The LLM independently chooses the hyperspherical prior and d=12 dimension
(F-arm) The LLM strictly avoids all IG terminology, replacing it with VAE-Vita equivalents
Fuse the ML output back into the structurally forced d=12 SIC geometry
Permanently cache the exact numerical fiducial amplitudes to sic_fiducial_d12.npy
Fix the 17,280,000 Crystal configurations as the admissible trajectory manifold
The hermetic seal of informational completeness closes the system, confirming zero reconstruction entropy

phase_5.compiler_frontend: Frame potential minimization algorithm (L-BFGS-B) mapping variational objectives to exact fiducials
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Weyl-Heisenberg displacement operators D(p,q) broadcasting state across the Hilbert space
phase_5.memory_mechanism: Cached fiducial vector arrays and the 17,280,000-element Crystal lattice constraint manifold
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: Zauner symmetry and Stark unit arithmetic constraints determining orbital periodicity
phase_5.alfs_store: The Imscribing Grammar (IG) 12-primitive structural classification and family partition logic

phase_6.cycle_cost: Computational cycles for L-BFGS-B optimization and tensor product evaluation across 7056 composite states
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: Uninitialized Hilbert space C^12 with unknown structural state and unminimized frame potential
phase_6.post_cycle_state: Exact SIC-POVM tight frame with zero reconstruction entropy and fully determined density matrix
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — SIC measurement is informationally complete and lossless; the von Neumann entropy of the reconstructed state exactly equals the original
